news.title:
cz: sbf asked for a $6b bailout as casually as ordering a sandwich 

binance founder changpeng zhao
news.summary:
cz: sbf asked for a $6b bailout as casually as ordering a sandwich 

binance founder changpeng zhao (cz) @cz_binance  stated in an april 14 interview with fox business that just before ftx's collapse, sbf mumbled a request for funds, constantly changing the amount from $2 billion to $6 billion, "as casually as ordering a sandwich." cz noted that very few people have that kind of massive cash lying around, bluntly stating that the situation was full of lies and fraud. 

additionally, cz described his experience writing a book in prison: using a terminal with only a messaging program, a 15-minute typing limit per session, no copy-and-paste functionality, and a 3,000-character limit per message. these extreme conditions forced him to quickly 하락 his thoughts, which actually pushed him to complete the "shitty first draft" of his new book.

news.title: 🇱🇧 lebanon is in a deeply difficult position when it comes to reining in hezbollah without tearing t
news.summary:
🇱🇧 lebanon is in a deeply difficult position when it comes to reining in hezbollah without tearing the country apart.

- hezbollah is not just a militia, it's woven into the social fabric of southern and eastern lebanon
- dismantling hezbollah without a security guarantee would leave lebanon exposed to a full israeli invasion with nothing to deter it
- families in those areas are mourning fighters killed on the front lines, hezbollah flags are visible across the region
- the lebanese army withdrew as israeli forces advanced, and communities haven't forgotten
- confronting hezbollah without first reassuring the shia community risks triggering internal strife
- that's why the lebanese army commander has been reluctant to act

source: al jazeera








mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🇺🇸🇮🇷 트럼프 says iran has agreed to hand over its "nuclear dust."

that's the highly enriched uranium buried underground after u.s. b-2 strikes on iran's nuclear facilities last summer. the iaea confirmed it's still down there. 

the u.s. has wanted it back badly enough that 트럼프 was reportedly planning a military raid to seize it before any deal.

no confirmation from iran yet, and previous u.s. claims about iranian nuclear commitments have fallen through before.

but if real, it's significant. 

handing over existing enriched stockpiles is a meaningful concession, even if iran still has the capacity to produce more.

트럼프 says more talks are coming this weekend. we’ll see…

source: washington post







— https://nitter.net/marionawfal/status/2045061955472466219#m

- the military considers it essential despite the risk

news.title:
global gold demand is being primarily driven by emerging markets:

emerging markets have accounted f
news.summary:
global gold demand is being primarily driven by emerging markets:

emerging markets have accounted for 70% of world gold demand over the last 10 years.

greater china alone made up 27% of global demand, the largest portion of any region, followed by india at 21%.

as a result, the two countries accounted for nearly half of all global gold demand.

by comparison, north america and europe, including russia, represented just 11% and 12%, respectively.

on the supply side, mine production accounted for 74% of total gold supply, with recycling reflecting the remaining 26%.

africa is the largest gold supply source, at 26%, followed by asia at 19%, the commonwealth of independent states (cis), central, and south america at 15% each, and north america at 14%.

emerging markets are fueling the gold rush.

news.title:
에센피랑 하이일드 크레딧 스프레드랑 저렇게 갭이 떴어.. 

에센피는 다시 빠르게 반등해서 ath 찍었는데.. 
크레딧은 반등폭을 못 따라가고 있는게 찜찜한 부분이야.  

저거
news.summary:
에센피랑 하이일드 크레딧 스프레드랑 저렇게 갭이 떴어.. 

에센피는 다시 빠르게 반등해서 ath 찍었는데.. 
크레딧은 반등폭을 못 따라가고 있는게 찜찜한 부분이야.  

저거 흰색선을 쉽게 설명해주자면,  
cdx hy cdsi gen 5y 가 뭐냐면, 미국 하이일드(정크) 기업들의 신용위험을 보여주는 대표 cds 지수 (5년물) 이야.  

그래서 스프레드가 확대될 수록, 기업들의 부도 리스크도 올라가고 금융 스트레스가 올라가고, 경기도 나쁜거지.  물론 여기 차트에서는 에센피랑 비교를 위해서 inverted 로 표기해서 반대로 해석해야 되고.  

그러니까 크레딧도 조금 개선되긴 했는데, 에센피가 지금 평소대비 혼자 너무 오바해서 슈팅하고 있다는 소리야.

news.title: with 93% of the votes counted, the right-wing candidate rafael lópez aliaga is closing the gap with
news.summary:
with 93% of the votes counted, the right-wing candidate rafael lópez aliaga is closing the gap with the left-wing candidate roberto sánchez in the battle for second place in the first round of the peruvian presidential election.

lópez aliaga is now just 7000 votes behind sánchez and most of the outstanding votes are from lópez aliaga strongholds, making it likely that it will be he who advances to the run-off.
